text: So let's say you want to extract the reviews for this product and we're going to use Helium 10. So you're going to click on this, I'm going to log in. I believe it's logged out. Alright, so after it's logged in you can see this, this option called Review Insights. Click on that and. See out of 570 written reviews, out of these many ratings There are only 570 written reviews. Helium 10 can extract only 390. We're going to export all of them. So click on export table. It will give you the file. So what you have to do in order to use the file that I sent you for Google Collab, you have to first on your drive, create a folder and inside that folder keep this file and also that Google Collab file written in Python. And then when you, you know, upload that file on Google Collab, then I showed you the process to copy how you can copy the path to this CSV and paste it there. So that's the process. Let me know if you have any more questions on this.
